message.flag: Possible keyboard trap: a click handler on a non-button element with no nearby keyboard handler; use <button> or add role="button" plus keydown for Enter and Space

fix.hint: Use a native <button>, or add role="button", tabindex="0", and a keydown handler for Enter and Space.

false_positive_notes: Window heuristic: a keyboard handler more than 3 lines from the click binding is not seen and the line still flags.
A click binding on an already-native control on a distant line still flags.

message.flag: onClick on a <div>/<span>; non-native controls are not keyboard operable by default

fix.hint: Use a native <button>, or add role="button", tabindex="0", and Enter/Space key handling.

false_positive_notes: Fires on any div/span with an onClick attribute even when role="button", tabindex, and key handlers are correctly present.

message.flag: outline:none/0 with no :focus-visible companion; keyboard focus will be invisible

fix.hint: Pair every outline:none with a :focus-visible rule that restores a visible ring.

false_positive_notes: Suppressed when :focus-visible appears anywhere in the same file; a separate reset file with the companion still flags.

message.flag: Possible focus trap: a line with aria-hidden="true" also contains a focusable element; hidden regions should not be focusable

fix.hint: Move focusable content out of the aria-hidden region, or add tabindex="-1" to remove it from the tab order.

false_positive_notes: Per-line heuristic: aria-hidden and a focusable element on different lines are not correlated.
Same-line aria-hidden plus a focusable element that is intentionally inert still flags.

message.flag: minmax(Npx, ...) with a fixed minimum; columns can overflow at 320px. Wrap with min(Npx, 100%)

fix.hint: Use minmax(min(Npx, 100%), 1fr) so the track can shrink below its pixel floor.

false_positive_notes: Suppressed by any min(Npx, 100%) in the file even if it belongs to a different rule.

message.flag: More than one role="alert" region; simultaneous announcements may be dropped by screen readers

fix.hint: Use a single shared live region, or downgrade non-urgent ones to role="status".

false_positive_notes: Counts every occurrence including regions rendered conditionally and never shown at the same time.

message.flag: :focus styled with no :focus-visible; pointer users get an unexpected focus ring. Pair :focus-visible with :focus

fix.hint: Add a :focus-visible rule so the ring shows for keyboard users without surprising pointer users.

false_positive_notes: Suppressed by any :focus-visible in the file; a :focus rule whose companion lives in a separate file still flags.

message.flag: Positive tabindex; a custom tab order often breaks reverse (Shift+Tab) navigation

fix.hint: Use tabindex="0" or rely on DOM order instead of a positive value.

false_positive_notes: Comments and <code>/<pre> example blocks are stripped before matching; a positive value inside a string literal can still match (user-facing-vs-not is a semantic call a static pass cannot settle).

message.flag: Input-method-specific copy ($0); not everyone clicks, taps, or swipes. Use device-agnostic wording such as select, activate, or open

fix.hint: Replace click/tap/swipe wording with device-neutral verbs like select, activate, choose, or open.

false_positive_notes: Matches the literal verbs only; press and localized text are not covered.
Comments and example-code blocks are stripped first; copy inside a string literal can still match — a string may be user-facing (innerHTML) or not, which is semantic.
